creator: fin.ai

evidence.text: Working closely with Fin, Anthropic made tweaks to improve Fin’s performance using built-in features like its “unanswered questions” report to pinpoint areas for improvement and ensure Fin was always delivering up-to-date, relevant answers. “Fin’s team was instrumental in guiding us through these optimizations,” says Isabel. “Their support helped us achieve quick wins and set us up for long-term success.”

title: Build vs buy: Why Anthropic chose Fin
